mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dashboard_conversation_turn ( session_id, employee_id, turn_index, start_message_id, end_message_id, start_time, end_time, user_input, total_input_tokens, total_output_tokens, total_tokens, total_cost, tool_calls_count, tool_calls_success, tool_calls_error, skill_calls_count, skill_calls_success, skill_calls_error, is_complete, has_error, status, total_duration_ms, tool_duration_ms, model_duration_ms, chain_summary, log_file_path, quality_status ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{employeeId}, #{turnIndex}, #{startMessageId}, #{endMessageId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{userInput}, #{totalInputTokens}, #{totalOutputTokens}, #{totalTokens}, #{totalCost}, #{toolCallsCount}, #{toolCallsSuccess}, #{toolCallsError}, #{skillCallsCount}, #{skillCallsSuccess}, #{skillCallsError}, #{isComplete}, #{hasError}, #{status}, #{totalDurationMs}, #{toolDurationMs}, #{modelDurationMs}, #{chainSummary}, #{logFilePath}, #{qualityStatus} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE end_message_id = VALUES(end_message_id), end_time = VALUES(end_time), total_input_tokens = VALUES(total_input_tokens), total_output_tokens = VALUES(total_output_tokens), total_tokens = VALUES(total_tokens), total_cost = VALUES(total_cost), tool_calls_count = VALUES(tool_calls_count), tool_calls_success = VALUES(tool_calls_success), tool_calls_error = VALUES(tool_calls_error), skill_calls_count = VALUES(skill_calls_count), skill_calls_success = VALUES(skill_calls_success), skill_calls_error = VALUES(skill_calls_error), is_complete = VALUES(is_complete), has_error = VALUES(has_error), status = VALUES(status), total_duration_ms = VALUES(total_duration_ms), tool_duration_ms = VALUES(tool_duration_ms), model_duration_ms = VALUES(model_duration_ms), chain_summary = VALUES(chain_summary)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM dashboard_conversation_turn WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY start_time
